## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 3, 2026 - May 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Marc Anderson_, May 17, 2026, 1/5: "I paid for the premium for life version, now the app shows me ads and locks me out of widgets saying I need premium. update 2 months later: still no fix. the email I was advised to contact stopped responding after I sent two different forms of proof of purchase. I sent a inquiry more recently to check in and no response. the app still randomly shows adds, widget stops updating or it says subscribe to premium. edit 2: now at 10 months with no further resolution or response."
            2. _Fabrizio_, May 3, 2026, 1/5: "premium weekly subscription from €15, madness. We're talking about €60 a month, €720 a year. The car costs me less. Unjustified price for any app. From the paywall it is not even clear what features would be unlocked in addition to removing advertisements."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: May 17, 2026 - May 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Marc Anderson_, May 17, 2026, 1/5: "I paid for the premium for life version, now the app shows me ads and locks me out of widgets saying I need premium. update 2 months later: still no fix. the email I was advised to contact stopped responding after I sent two different forms of proof of purchase. I sent a inquiry more recently to check in and no response. the app still randomly shows adds, widget stops updating or it says subscribe to premium. edit 2: now at 10 months with no further resolution or response."
